collectionProcessors.name: Invalid_Invoice_Items
collectionProcessors.label: Invalid Invoice Items

customErrorMessages.errorMessage: Cannot save Complaint: At least one related Invoice Line Item status conflicts with the chosen Complaint Category configuration.

Flow.interviewLabel: Complaint: Validate Related Line Item Statuses on Update {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Complaint: Validate Related Line Item Statuses on Update
